title: RYR1 / desflurane
summary: Patients with the rs28933396 AA genotype may develop malignant hyperthermia when treated with volatile anesthetics (desflurane, enflurane, halothane, isoflurane, methoxyflurane, sevoflurane) and/or succinylcholine as compared to patients with the GG genotype.
